summary: Tested UI visibility improvements for audit day. All features working correctly: Audit Quick View section with 5 status cards, DBS/RTW badges in What's Needed tab, Documents tab with expiry status, and updated helper text across tabs. Fixed RTW badge ID mismatch bug.

issues: Still shows 'Documents Pending' text in contact info area - should be 'Recruitment File: Incomplete' per requirements (carried over from iteration 38)

passed_tests: ✅ Audit Quick View section visible at top of Employee Profile with 5 status cards
✅ DBS status card shows appropriate state (Pending Review - blue background)
✅ RTW status card shows appropriate state (Pending Review - blue background after fix)
✅ Training status card shows verified count (6/6 Verified - green background)
✅ Documents status card shows unverified count (8 Unverified - amber background)
✅ Progress status card shows completion percentage (69% Complete - red background)
✅ DBS badges (green) visible next to DBS Certificate and DBS Update Service in What's Needed tab
✅ RTW badges (green) visible next to Right to Work Documents and RTW Verification in What's Needed tab (after fix)
✅ Helper text updated on What's Needed tab: 'Upload each required document, then verify it. Only verified documents count towards compliance.'
✅ Helper text updated on Training tab: 'Track completion status, expiry dates, and renewal status. Verified training counts toward work readiness.'
✅ Helper text updated on Documents tab: 'Upload and verify documents. Only verified documents count towards compliance.'
✅ Helper text updated on Training Matrix page: 'Track staff training, expiry dates, and renewals. Use filters to find risks quickly.'
✅ Documents tab shows expiry status prominently (Valid until date badge, Expires date text)
✅ No regression to unified training sync - training changes reflect across tabs (6/6 Verified consistent)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed RTW badge ID mismatch: Code was checking for 'rtw_documents'/'rtw_verification' but actual IDs are 'right_to_work_documents'/'right_to_work_check'
Audit Quick View section properly calculates DBS/RTW/Training/Documents status from compliance requirements
Expiry status badges in Documents tab use color-coded backgrounds (red=expired, amber=expiring_soon, green=valid)
Helper text across all tabs provides clear guidance for audit compliance
seed_data_creation: None - used existing employee data (Olakunle Alonge)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI visibility improvements for audit day verified. Key features: (1) Audit Quick View section with 5 status cards (DBS, RTW, Training, Documents, Progress) at top of employee profile, (2) DBS/RTW colored badges in What's Needed tab next to relevant requirements, (3) Documents tab shows expiry status with colored badges, (4) Updated helper text across What's Needed, Training, Documents tabs and Training Matrix page. Fixed RTW badge ID mismatch (rtw_documents -> right_to_work_documents, rtw_verification -> right_to_work_check). Training sync still working correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_found: RTW badges not showing in What's Needed tab
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Code was checking for requirement IDs 'rtw_documents' and 'rtw_verification' but the actual backend requirement IDs are 'right_to_work_documents' and 'right_to_work_check'
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Updated 3 locations in EmployeeProfilePage.js to use correct requirement IDs
rca_of_the_issue.verification: RTW badges now visible with correct colors (green for verified)
